Name: Doc
Description: Doc got his medical degree at the University of Notre Dame, where he also served as the quarterback for the Fighting Irish. While working towards his degree, he served a clinical rotation in a Virginia prison where he saw some of the worst mankind had to offer when he an inmate slit another inmate's throat with a sharpened toothbrush like it was nothing.
